MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regularly scheduled calendar. Present:Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:John Stokes, Reporter:Ronald Sinclair. All parties present except defendant. Arnold W. Evje II representing plaintiff. No appearances by either defendant the case was taken off-calendar and the Jury Trial was stricken.
